scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=open-erp-services && npm install --workspace=open-erp-ui && npm install --workspace=open-erp-web
scripts.audit:fix:all: npm audit fix && npm audit fix --workspace=open-erp-services && npm audit fix --workspace=open-erp-ui && npm audit fix --workspace=open-erp-web
scripts.dev: npm run ui:build && concurrently "npm run services:dev" "npm run ui:watch" "npm run web:dev"
